fields.description: Select: newline-separated options. Link: the target doctype.

fields.description: Optional JS condition to show this field only when relevant, e.g. eval:doc.asm_along=='Yes' (native frappe-ui depends_on). Multi-branch eval expressions can be long.
fields.label: Depends On

fields.description: Optional: a first-class CRM Task column this field writes to (e.g. custom_visit_status). Blank = stored in the JSON payload.
fields.label: First-Class Target
